query:
-- Verificar detalhes das 3 duplicatas
SELECT ep.id, ep.eventId, ep.alunoId, ep.status, e.title 
FROM event_participation ep 
JOIN events e ON ep.eventId = e.id
WHERE (ep.eventId = 30010 AND ep.alunoId = 30073)
   OR (ep.eventId = 30013 AND ep.alunoId = 30071)
   OR (ep.eventId = 30005 AND ep.alunoId = 30031)
ORDER BY ep.eventId, ep.alunoId, ep.id;
